sections.instruction: Questions 1-7: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer. Questions 8-10: Label the map below. Write the appropriate letter A-E on the map.

sections.instruction: Questions 31-36: Complete the summary below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer. Questions 37-40: Write the appropriate letters A, B or C next to questions 37-40.

questions.content: The Australian mining town of Coober Pedy is about (31) {{BLANK}} kms south of Alice Springs. Opals were first found in the area in (32) {{BLANK}} and people began to settle there after the (33) {{BLANK}}. In the late 1940s new opal fields and mass immigration from (34) {{BLANK}} created a boom, despite the extreme climate which forced about (35) {{BLANK}} of the population to live underground, where they built hotels, churches and the world’s only underground (36) {{BLANK}}.

options: A in the town of Coober Pedy
